title: Layer 2: Treatment and Storage Systems
description: Schema for a water utility's capacity for treating and storing water from input sources, including average and peak demand within the utility's water service area.

current_year_source.description: Citation for the current year of data.

treatment_plants.description: Array of individual water treatment plants with their capacities and water sources.

plant_name.description: Name of the water treatment plant.

maximum_daily_treatment_capacity.description: Maximum daily treatment capacity of this plant.

maximum_daily_treatment_capacity_source.description: Citation for this plant's maximum daily treatment capacity.

water_source.description: The specific named water source used by this plant.

source_name.description: Name of the water source (e.g., 'Colorado River', 'Edwards Aquifer', 'Barren River Lake').

water_source_source.description: Citation for this plant's water source information.

total_maximum_daily_treatment_capacity.description: Total maximum daily treatment capacity across all water treatment plants.

total_maximum_daily_treatment_capacity_s.description: Citation for the total maximum daily treatment capacity.

current_average_daily_demand.description: Current average daily water demand within the service area.

current_average_daily_demand_source.description: Citation for the current average daily demand.

current_peak_daily_demand.description: Current peak daily water demand across all seasons of the year.

current_peak_daily_demand_source.description: Citation for the current peak daily demand.

storage_facilities.description: Array of individual treated water storage tanks and reservoirs with their capacities and supplying treatment plants.

facility_name.description: Name of the storage tank or reservoir.

storage_capacity_source.description: Citation for this facility's storage capacity.

supplying_treatment_plants.description: Names of the water treatment plants (one or more) that supply treated water to this storage facility.

supplying_treatment_plants_source.description: Citation for which treatment plants supply this facility.

total_treated_water_storage_capacity.description: Total treated water storage capacity across all tanks and reservoirs.

total_treated_water_storage_capacity_sou.description: Citation for the total treated water storage capacity.

future_projections.description: Optional future projections for treatment capacity, demand, and storage.

future_year.description: The projected future year for these estimates.

future_year_source.description: Citation for the future projection year.

future_total_maximum_daily_treatment_cap.description: Projected total maximum daily treatment capacity across all water treatment plants.
Citation for the projected total treatment capacity.

future_average_daily_demand.description: Projected future average daily water demand.

future_average_daily_demand_source.description: Citation for the projected average daily demand.

future_peak_daily_demand.description: Projected future peak daily water demand.

future_peak_daily_demand_source.description: Citation for the projected peak daily demand.

future_total_treated_water_storage_capac.description: Projected total treated water storage capacity across all tanks and reservoirs.
Citation for the projected total storage capacity.

volume_measurement.description: A numeric volume value with its unit of measurement.

citation.description: A data source citation consisting of a document title, URL, and optional page number.

page_number.description: Optional page number within the source document.
